note: Each source run is scored only by templates and ML trained with that run removed.
ML features exclude run, event number, current, group, downstream label, and stratum labels.
Fold diagnostics record the source runs used to generate synthetic ML training overlays.
Very high synthetic AUC would be suspicious because held-out runs contain independent residuals.
Shuffled-label training should not classify held-out synthetic overlays well.
Flagged if the ML amplitude estimate nearly identifies beam current by itself.
